primary_issue.title: 实现 guru-review-branch 闭环 Skill
primary_issue.reason: 当前唯一 independently deliverable 主目标。
acceptance_evidence: guru-review-branch 已作为 Interface 1.3 active closed-loop Skill 实现：六字段 public input、四个 typed exits、独立 semantic owner、finding lifecycle、fresh-final、deterministic recorder/validator 与五类平台分发合同均已闭合。

Fresh Phase 2 typed exit 为 passed；runtime 566 passed/13 skipped、Skill 171/171、preset 45/45、contract 8/8、ownership 9/9、source/installed eval 各 7/7、package closure 10 Skills/39 exits/23 targets、installed 1903 managed files且 sidecar/removal/conflict 均为 0。

五个 task work commits 精确绑定最终 reviewed content HEAD c18efe0f73f03d216a7f4e873907569922e800be；2632 JSON、295 shell、116 Python compile、throwaway install/update/reapply、dogfood drift、P18 ownership 与 Docs SSOT 验证通过。
Branch Review Gate 绑定 origin/main...c18efe0f73f03d216a7f4e873907569922e800be；前序 findings 全部关闭，Round 12 fresh final reviewer 的 P0/P1/P2/P3 与 scope proposals 均为 0，typed exit 为 passed。

rules: close_issues 只放当前 task 明确承诺完整解决且 review gate 已验证的 issue。
related_issues 只能生成 Refs/Related 语义，不能自动关闭。
followup_issues 表示新范围或后续任务，不能自动关闭。
